name: WhatsMyName
description: OSINT username enumeration across ~700 sites using the WhatsMyName dataset, checked directly from the Vineyard desktop app. Desktop only: a browser cannot read the cross-origin responses these checks depend on.

plugins.name: WhatsMyName Account Search
plugins.description: Checks whether the selected username exists across ~700 sites (WhatsMyName dataset) by querying each site directly from the Vineyard desktop app, and adds the discovered accounts to the graph. Desktop only — a browser cannot read the cross-origin responses these checks depend on.

network.purpose: Fetch the latest WhatsMyName site list (CDN, CORS-enabled).

web_probe.purpose: Request each WhatsMyName site directly to see whether the handle resolves to a profile. Desktop only; the request is anonymous (no cookies), never follows redirects, and cannot reach private or loopback addresses.
